case_title: PRYOR, RICKEY VS GLOBAL SECURITY MANAGEMENT AGENCY

docket_entries.description: CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 27475, RECORD TRANSFERRED
LETTER FROM DEFT RE: PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED
CERT MAIL SENT TO CHUCK CRANE RETURNED SIGNED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PRYOR, RICKEY AS TO DEFENDANT GLOBAL SECURITY MANAGEMENT AGENCY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-28-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT GLOBAL SECURITY MANAGEMENT AGENCY
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF APR-15-2004, OFF CALENDAR AS TO THIRD PARTY CHUCK CRANE, GLOBAL SECURITY MANAGEMENT AGENCY
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY CHUCK CRANE, GLOBAL SECURITY MANAGEMENT AGENCY HEARING SET FOR APR-15-2004 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PRYOR, RICKEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GLOBAL SECURITY MANAGEMENT AGENCY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,032.00, DEFENDANTS NAME CHANGE TO GLOBAL SECURITY MANAGEMENT AGENCY (GSMA) AT DEFENDANTS REQUEST WITH CONSENT OF PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PRYOR, RICKEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GLOBAL SECURITY MANAGEMENT AGENCY $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 27475 ON 2/25/04 EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. (GIVEN THAT THE SECURITY GURARD WHO ALLEGEDLY SAW MR. PRYOR TAKE THE SANDWICH DID NOT TESTIFY AND (2) MR. PRYOR PURCHASED OVER $80 IN ITEMS (INCLUDI SANDWICH MAKING ITEMS SUCH AS 'SALAMI, BREAD PICKLES, CHIPS, ETC) FROM THE STORE I DO NOT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
